ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* A flag to indicate the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock category */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the stock category belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector within the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* A URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* The price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was purchased */,
  "last_checked_price" REAL /* The last checked price of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* The type of update (e.g., add, modify, delete) */,
  "affected_rows" INTEGER /* The number of rows affected by the update */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* A detailed log of the update for audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who requested the report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, scatter) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* JSON string containing the chart configuration */,
  "chart_title" TEXT /* The title of the chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the chart */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* The date and time when the chart was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the recommendation */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* A detailed message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* The duration for which the alert is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the stock */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news */,
  "link" TEXT /* A link to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
